steps.command: docker image inspect m.daocloud.io/docker.io/flink-pyflink:2.2.0-py314-arm-final >/dev/null 2>&1 || IMAGE_NAME=m.daocloud.io/docker.io/flink-pyflink:2.2.0-py314-arm-final BASE_IMAGE=m.daocloud.io/docker.io/flink:2.2.0-java17 NETWORK=flink-network PYTHON_VERSION=3.14.3 TM_COUNT=2 USE_TMPFS=true bash /tmp/build-flink-image.sh aarch64
steps.description: Build Flink+PyFlink image on kunpeng (~80 min first run)
